stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the product showcase module to ensure efficient data retrieval and display. • Database Schema Design: Schema design for the product showcase database to store and retrieve IT solution information.
stories.description: The system must display a product showcase of available IT solutions.
stories.testCases:
Test Case: Verify that the product showcase displays IT solutions correctly
Test Case: Verify that demo viewing with engagement tracking works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the RFD multi-step form works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the contact communication hub works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the authentication system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the lead management system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that behavioral analytics viewing works correctly
Test Case: Verify that lead status management works correctly
Test Case: Verify that pages load within 2 seconds under normal traffic
Test Case: Verify that encrypted password storage works correctly
Test Case: Verify that secure login sessions work correctly
Test Case: Verify that protection against unauthorized access works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the system architecture supports growth in visitor traffic
Test Case: Verify that the system maintains high uptime and prevents data loss
Test Case: Verify that the system handles multiple user roles correctly
stories.title: Display A Product Showcase Of

stories.definitionOfDone: • User Training Documentation: User training documentation to ensure users can effectively use the demo viewing feature. • Unit Tests: Unit tests to validate the demo viewing functionality and engagement tracking.
stories.description: The system must allow users to view demos with engagement tracking.
stories.testCases:
Test Case: Verify that the authentication system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the lead management system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the system architecture supports growth in visitor traffic
Test Case: Verify that the system maintains high uptime and prevents data loss
Test Case: Verify that the system handles multiple user roles correctly
stories.title: Allow Users To View Demos

stories.definitionOfDone: • Database Schema Design: Schema design for the RFD form database to store user input and demo information. • Production Support Plan: Development of a production support plan to handle RFD form submissions and demo requests.
stories.description: The system must have a multi-step Request for Demo (RFD) form to collect user information.
stories.testCases:
Test Case: Verify that the RFD multi-step form works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the authentication system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the lead management system works correctly
Test Case: Verify that the system architecture supports growth in visitor traffic
Test Case: Verify that the system maintains high uptime and prevents data loss
Test Case: Verify that the system handles multiple user roles correctly
stories.title: Have A Multi-step Request Demo
